channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LUDOC-270] Revise the protocol document outline and modularize it
item.description:
The original outline commit in response to LUDOC-266 lists the project goals as they appear in the contract. While that is comprehensive, it is not necessarily an optimum outline for the presentation of the material. New content that actually addresses project goals will be added in response to this ticket, and it will be good to have that new content fit will within the outline.

The current outline is all one file. As we progress it will likely quickly become desirable to have the content available in a more modular form. The patches introduced for this will break the file up into topical pieces.

The update will also include a new 'basement' directory where content can be placed that does not need aggressive review and is not specifically targeted to be part of the project deliverables.
item.summary: Revise the protocol document outline and modularize it

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Mike Pershin (mike.pershin@intel.com) uploaded a new patch: http://review.whamcloud.com/15423

Subject: LUDOC-270 doc: describe more connect flags
Project: doc/protocol
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 6dd994a279ba773b290b4efac52b5d91b8252248

Mike Pershin (mike.pershin@intel.com) uploaded a new patch: http://review.whamcloud.com/15191
Subject: LUDOC-270 doc: describe more connect flags
Project: doc/protocol
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 5ed3262dee2064d8bc6e6ce97cde20bf0ef8b5b5

Mike Pershin (mike.pershin@intel.com) uploaded a new patch: http://review.whamcloud.com/14970
Subject: LUDOC-270 doc: connection doc update
Project: doc/protocol
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 1b6a31517a4cd89065c0f68f2ddd86c94d47cd2d

The outline has been updated and some content put in place. The outline may still be imperfect, and the content needs a lot of work. Subsequent tickets and patches will address very specific changes rather than the "whole document" change represented in this issue.

Andrew Uselton (andrew.c.uselton@intel.com) merged in patch http://review.whamcloud.com/13938/
Subject: LUDOC-270 protocol: Update the outline and add support files
Project: doc/protocol
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 1ed3ecf73459db3dede7cff1748644203bb76002

Andrew Uselton (andrew.c.uselton@intel.com) uploaded a new patch: http://review.whamcloud.com/13938
Subject: LUDOC-270 protocol: Update the outline and add support files
Project: doc/protocol
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 28e70f40ecd7c95d86c4f26b60573ae20e227891
At Andreas's suggestion, I am going to abandon these two patch sets and upload a single patch set that combines them. Still learning to drive...

These two patch sets (13935, 13936) build one on the other. This is modifying the outline to look more like what we want to present. It adds a bunch of content related to the client-to-MDS interaction during a 'mount' operation. There are also some appendices with alphabetical listings of the various components that go into building Lustre messages.

Andrew Uselton (andrew.c.uselton@intel.com) uploaded a new patch: http://review.whamcloud.com/13936
Subject: LUDOC-270 protocol: More about Lustre messages
Project: doc/protocol
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 44112de42db446cb4ae3987c9f6078a9b5699963

Andrew Uselton (andrew.c.uselton@intel.com) uploaded a new patch: http://review.whamcloud.com/13935
Subject: LUDOC-270 protocol: Update the outline and add support files
Project: doc/protocol
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: a494108620f7a0fd284b9f91c84ed027e9369faa

Andreas Dilger (andreas.dilger@intel.com) merged in patch http://review.whamcloud.com/13919/
Subject: LUDOC-270 protocol: Add a 'basement' dir with support files
Project: doc/protocol
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 083ac0ef937906fdf8b908b9f3d2e5cddc1919b3

N.B. This patch set just adds some support files in the 'basement'. I am happy to have people review and comment on them, but don't worry too much about it. That is, if you do not review it at all it will cause no great harm. It's just my notes-to-self. The real content is forthcoming.
Cheers,
Andrew
